ogTitle: Bolwarra Heights vs Bom Bom: Climate Safety

heading: Bolwarra Heights vs Bom Bom — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bolwarra Heights, New South Wales and Bom Bom, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bom Bom has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Bolwarra Heights (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bolwarra Heights or Bom Bom safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bolwarra Heights has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Bom Bom scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bolwarra Heights scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Bom Bom scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bolwarra Heights or Bom Bom?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bom Bom has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
